programme.title: Zou

programme.title: Dee Dee

programme.title: Comhrá

programme.title: Malcolm in the Middle

programme.title: Cheers

programme.desc: Ar chlár an lae inniu beidh sí-abhabha ag imirt billéardaí agus pearóid ag seinm an veidhlín. (Today a Chihuahua plays billiards and a parrot plays violin.)

programme.title: Timpeall na Tíre
programme.desc: Achoimre ar chuid de mhórscéalta na seachtaine mar a craoladh ar Nuacht TG4. (Some of the stories from this week's regional news as seen on Nuacht TG4.)

programme.title: Malcolm in the Middle
programme.desc: Cuirtear i leith Hal go raibh sé ag goid fad a bhíonn sé ag ceannach clúidíní. (Hal goes out for diapers, only to be branded a shoplifter.)

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cuireann Carla isteach ar chomórtas damhsa lena iarfhear céile cantalach, Nick. (Carla teams up with her snarly ex-husband, Nick, to enter a local dance contest.)

programme.title: Geantraí
programme.desc: Rinneadh taifeadadh ar an gclár seo i dteach tábhairne Johnny Walsh i gContae na Gaillimhe. (Johnny Walsh's Pub in Gort, Co. Galway is today's venue for Geantraí.)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Fad is a bhíonn sí ag teach ósta cois locha feiceann Jessica duine ag brú duine eile amach san uisce. (Jessica witnesses someone being pushed into a lake.)

programme.title: Scoil Samhraidh Willie Clancy
programme.desc: Scoth an cheoil ó Scoil Samhraidh Willie Clancy 2024. (This series brings together the very best in traditional music from the Willie Clancy Summer School.)

programme.title: Taste of Australia with Hayden Quinn
programme.desc: Téann Hayden síos Abhainn Murrumbidgee agus tugann sé cuairt ar thrá intíre. (Hayden journeys down the Murrumbidgee River and visits to an inland beach.)

programme.title: Glór Tíre
programme.desc: Rogha & Togha an naoú sraith de Ghlór Tíre. (The best selection of songs from the 9th instalment of the popular country music series.)

programme.title: The Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: Téann Lorelai sa tóir ar fhear a casadh uirthi ag ceant a d'eagraigh a máthair. (Lorelai pursues an attractive man whom she met at an auction.)

programme.title: An Aimsir Láithreach
programme.desc: Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)

programme.title: Anfa
programme.desc: Is í Scoil Iarfhlatha i dTuaim i gCo. na Gaillimhe a bheidh ag tabhairt faoin scamall draíochta inniu. (Scoil Iarfhlatha from Tuam in Co. Galway take on the magical cloud today.)

programme.title: Éadaí SOS
programme.desc: An éireoidh le Caoimhe nósanna siopadóireachta Dháithí a fheabhsú? (Will Dáithí be inspired to make more sustainable choices?)

programme.title: Sonas

programme.title: GAA 2026
